care.summary: Extremely tough, low-light houseplant that tolerates neglect; lives up to its 'cast iron' name.
care.light: Low to moderate indirect light; tolerates deep shade
care.water: Water sparingly; let soil dry out between waterings
care.humidity: Low to average; forgiving of dry air
care.fertilizer: Feed monthly in spring/summer with balanced liquid fertilizer
common_issues: Brown leaf tips from dry air or underwatering
tips: Wipe leaves occasionally to remove dust
Divide clumps in spring for propagation
Avoid direct sun — leaves will scorch
Can bloom with small purple flowers at soil level
